title: Origins: Ethereal Architect
description: Adds a world-bending Origin with it's own Dimension, which he can shape and merge with The Vanilla Dimensions, The Overworld, Nether and End! (For Fabric)
body:
# Ethereal Architect
_"Ethereal Architects are beings that exist outside of our own realm while capable of coexisting with it. Theorized to be composed of unordinary matter, these architects are capable of designing new worlds and the spaces around them, and are thought to be tasked with restoring and conserving existing worlds."_

`Made for Fabric, Minecraft version 1.20.2, Origins version 1.12.10) impact: 1, Icon: Brush`

### "The Ethereal Realm":
- [+] You spawn here.
- [+] You are capable of merging it with copies of the vanilla dimensions!
- [+] Scroll Dimensions to Merge with, with [Secondary Active]!

### "Dimension Hop":
- [+] Hop Dimensions with [Sneak] and [Primary Active] while holding an Ender Pearl!
- [+] Any entities close to you will hop with you.
- [-] Doing this consumes The Ender Pearl.

### "In Your Realm":
- [+] Any naturally spawning mobs from all the vanilla dimensions spawn here, but they do have their preferences of where to spawn!

### "Sidenotes":
- This Origin adds 4 new dimensions, 1 of which is The Ethereal Realm, and 3 are vanilla copies of the Overworld, Nether and End.
- It is these plain copies that are merged with the Ethereal Realm, not the REAL dimensions that are accessable by players.
- Out of these 4 new dimensions, only the Ethereal Realm is accessable. It is this way so that you cannot duplicate items or chests!

_Origin by Frucs!_

### "Known Bugs":
- None! If you find anything you feel is unintended, let me know on Discord!

### Important: Dimension Hop power has been reported to not work on 1.20.1 Fabric
